categories.name: filtering_ambiguity
categories.description: 512 ERDs show filtering disagreement. Filter patterns in AGENTS.md are ambiguous or missing edge cases.
root_causes: Empty filter_reason (456 ERDs) — reviewers filtered without matching any named pattern, suggesting implicit rules not documented
Matter pattern (14 ERDs) — 6/7 filter, but ProvincialCrocodile does not
Push notification (9 ERDs) — 6/7 filter, but ProvincialCrocodile does not
Available (60 ERDs) — reviewers split on whether 'available' in name means filter
Fault (26 ERDs) — 5/7 filter, but 2/7 do not
Raw type (29 ERDs) — reviewers split on raw-type data fields
Camera (13 ERDs) — 6/7 filter, but ProvincialCrocodile does not
Allowed (15 ERDs) — reviewers split on 'allowed'
Supported feature (15 ERDs) — 6/7 filter, but ProvincialCrocodile does not
recommendations: Add explicit examples for each filter pattern
Clarify whether 'available' and 'allowed' are filter triggers

categories.name: enum_handling_ambiguity
categories.description: 276 ERDs show enum domain disagreement. 2-value descriptive enums are the most disputed area.
root_causes: 3-value+ writable enums → 6/7 agree on select, but current spec says sensor/enum
2-value descriptive enums writable → 3/7 select, 3/7 switch, 1/7 binary_sensor
2-value descriptive enums read-only → 6/7 sensor, 1/7 binary_sensor
2-value On/Off enums writable → 5/7 switch, 1/7 select, 1/7 binary_sensor
recommendations: Clarify: 2-value descriptive read-only enums → sensor with device_class: enum

categories.name: bool_handling_ambiguity
categories.description: 85 ERDs show bool domain disagreement. Writable bools → switch or binary_sensor?
root_causes: Writable bools → 6/7 switch, 1/7 binary_sensor (strong agreement)
Read-only bools → 3/7 binary_sensor, 2/7 switch, 1/7 null, 1/7 button (split)
One-shot reset → 1/7 button, 5/7 switch, 1/7 binary_sensor (majority disagrees with AGENTS.md)
recommendations: Clarify: read-only bools → binary_sensor (need to address 4/7 who disagree)
Clarify: one-shot commands → switch (5/7) or button (1/7)

categories.name: multi_field_handling_ambiguity
categories.description: 755 ERDs show multi-field domain disagreement. Writable multi-field ERDs should be number or sensor?
root_causes: Multi-field read-only → 6/7 sensor, 1/7 null (strong agreement)
Multi-field writable → 4/7 sensor, 2/7 number, 1/7 select (split)
Multi-field writable with temperature → 5/7 number, 1/7 null, 1/7 sensor (strong agreement)
recommendations: Clarify: writable multi-field ERDs → sensor unless all sub-fields are temperature setpoints → number
Document exception for mixed-type multi-field ERDs

categories.name: device_class_ambiguity
categories.description: 773 ERDs show device_class disagreement. When to assign device_class vs null?
root_causes: Temperature sensors → 6/7 null, 1/7 temperature (majority disagrees with AGENTS.md)
Enum sensors → 4/7 enum, 3/7 null (split)
Temperature setpoints → 2/7 temperature, 5/7 null (majority disagrees with AGENTS.md)
recommendations: Clarify: temperature sensors → device_class: temperature (AGENTS.md clear, but 6/7 prefer null)
Clarify: enum sensors → device_class: enum (4/7 agree vs 3/7 null)
Clarify: temperature setpoints → device_class: temperature (AGENTS.md says yes, but 5/7 prefer null)
Add explicit guidance for when device_class should be null vs assigned
